'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 17''' was the seventeenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 24]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Occupation of Bespin|Flight To Bespin - Vader's Trap]]
*[[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Wald's Parts|Watto's Shop]]
*[[CZ-series secretary/comm droid|CZ Secretary/Comm Droid]]
*[[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9 Supervisor Droid]]
*Camouflage Methods
*[[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]]
